title: Mesh2Motion
permitted_uses: Technology evaluation for browser-based auto-rigging and animation export.
claims_supported: Mesh2Motion is a 3D animation library and auto-rigging tool for web and game engines.
Mesh2Motion supports GLB export and states code is MIT licensed.
The site states exported animation content is free for personal or commercial use and licensed CC0.
claims_not_supported: That Mesh2Motion can rig every clinical character mesh without manual QA.
That Mesh2Motion supplies medically specific gestures or facial animation.
